mdSummary:
# Alert

Inline callout for status, warning, or informational messages.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/alert

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Alert | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Alert | Variant | `AlertVariant` | `AlertVariant.Default` |  |
| Alert | Size | `AlertSize` | `AlertSize.Medium` |  |
| Alert | IsDismissible | `bool` | `` |  |
| Alert | OnDismiss | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Alert | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| Alert | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| Alert | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| Alert | ShowIcon | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Alert | AutoDismissMs | `int?` | `` |  |
| Alert | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Alert | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Alert) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (Alert) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

## Events
- `OnDismiss` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Alert />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Alert/Alert.razor`
